body: Use check_documentation_health_tool with create_tasks=${1|true,false|} to analyze documentation health.
Use analyze_todo2_alignment_tool with create_followup_tasks=${1|true,false|} to analyze task alignment.
Use detect_duplicate_tasks_tool with similarity_threshold=${1:0.85} and auto_fix=${2|true,false|} to find duplicate tasks.
Use scan_dependency_security_tool with languages=${1|None,['python'],['rust'],['npm']|} to scan dependencies for vulnerabilities.
MCP Tool: Security Scan.description: MCP tool: Scan dependencies for security

body: Use find_automation_opportunities_tool with min_value_score=${1:0.7} to discover automation opportunities.
Use sync_todo_tasks_tool with dry_run=${1|true,false|} to synchronize tasks across systems.
MCP Tool: Task Sync.description: MCP tool: Sync tasks across systems

body: Use review_pwa_config_tool to review PWA configuration.
Use the doc_health_check prompt to analyze documentation health and create tasks for issues.
Use the task_alignment prompt to analyze Todo2 task alignment with project goals.
Use the duplicate_cleanup prompt to find and consolidate duplicate Todo2 tasks.
Use the security_scan_all prompt to scan all project dependencies for security vulnerabilities.
Use the pre_sprint_cleanup prompt to run the pre-sprint cleanup workflow (duplicates, alignment, documentation).
Use the weekly_maintenance prompt to run the weekly maintenance workflow (docs, duplicates, security, sync).
Use the post_implementation_review prompt to run the post-implementation review workflow (docs, security, automation).
